# dumbroof.ai — AI-Powered Insurance Claim Intelligence

## What is dumbroof.ai?
dumbroof.ai is an AI platform that generates forensic-grade insurance claim appeal packages for roofing contractors. Upload source documents (carrier scope, EagleView measurements, CompanyCam photos), and receive 5 professional documents in 15 minutes:
1. Forensic Causation Report — evidence-based damage analysis with photo annotations
2. Xactimate-Style Estimate — line-by-line scope with building code citations
3. Scope Comparison Report — carrier scope vs. contractor scope with variance analysis
4. Scope Clarification Letter — professional carrier communication
5. Cover Email — ready-to-send summary

## Key Results
- $1.37M in carrier movement across 34 claims
- 10 wins, 29% win rate
- Biggest single win: $943,233 from a $20,469 carrier scope (46x)
- Cost per claim: under $1 in AI tokens ($0.41-$1.15 depending on photo count)

## Who Uses It
- Roofing contractors processing storm damage insurance claims
- Insurance restoration companies scaling their supplement operations
- Public adjusters and attorneys preparing denial appeals

## Products
- dumbroof.ai — Full claim intelligence (forensic reports, estimates, appeals)
- dumb roof repair — AI-powered leak diagnosis and repair documentation
- dumb roof inspection — HAAG-certified inspection coordination

## Pages
- / — Homepage with product overview and beta signup
- /pricing — Subscription tiers and pricing
- /learn — Educational blog on insurance claims, supplements, building codes
- /login — User authentication
- /dashboard — Claim management dashboard (authenticated)
